name: OmopSpecimenSpecimenView
title: Specimen → specimen (flat)
description: One FHIR Specimen maps to exactly one OMOP specimen row. The specimen table captures biological samples collected from a person, including specimen type, collection date, quantity, anatomic site, and disease status. Specimen type (kind of material) maps to specimen_concept_id via SNOMED, while specimen_type_concept_id is a provenance metadata field (EHR = 32817). Collection date is required in OMOP but optional in FHIR.

column.name: specimen_id
column.description: Surrogate key. Hash/sequence/lookup of Specimen.id. Store FHIR ID or first identifier in specimen_source_id for traceability. — transform: hash_or_sequence(Specimen.id)

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference to integer person_id. Subject must be a Patient -- reject Device, Group, Location, Substance subjects. — transform: resolve_patient_reference(Specimen.subject)

column.name: specimen_concept_id
column.description: Map to OMOP concept in Specimen domain. Prefer SNOMED coding if multiple codings present. Fall back to 0 if no mapping found.

column.name: specimen_date
column.description: OMOP requires this field (NOT NULL). If collected[x] is a Period, use Period.start. If absent, try Specimen.receivedTime as fallback. — transform: date_component(collected[x]); if Period use Period.start; fallback to Specimen.receivedTime

column.name: specimen_datetime
column.description: Full datetime of collection. Same source as specimen_date but preserves time component. — transform: full_datetime(collected[x]); if date-only append T00:00:00

column.name: quantity
column.description: Amount of specimen collected. Direct numeric copy from collection.quantity.value.

column.name: unit_concept_id
column.description: Look up UCUM code in CONCEPT table (vocabulary_id = 'UCUM'). Default 0 if lookup fails. — transform: lookup_ucum(quantity.code where quantity.system = 'http://unitsofmeasure.org')

column.name: unit_source_value
column.description: Raw unit string. Prefer quantity.unit (human-readable); fall back to quantity.code (UCUM code).

column.name: anatomic_site_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED body site code mapped to OMOP concept. Use first coding from bodySite.coding[]. Default 0 if unmapped.

column.name: anatomic_site_source_value
column.description: Source text for anatomic site. Prefer bodySite.text, then coding[0].display, then coding[0].code.

column.name: disease_status_source_value
column.description: Source text for disease/condition status. Prefer condition.text, then coding[0].display, then coding[0].code.

column.name: specimen_source_id
column.description: Source system identifier. omoponfhir uses first identifier value. Can also use Specimen.accessionIdentifier.value.

column.name: specimen_source_value
column.description: Verbatim source code/text for the specimen type. Populated when specimen_concept_id is 0 (unmapped). Use type.text if available, otherwise system|code or display of first coding, truncated to 50 chars.
